$comment: Predicate registry for the ADR-018 source-attributed claim graph. SCOPE: this registry contains ONLY predicates that appear as P177 targets on E13 reifications. E13-internal direct edges (hapi:derived_by_run, hapi:supersedes) and verdict-outcome E55 Type instances (hapi:verdict_*) are NOT here -- they live in hapi_extension.rdf and are validated by the cidoc-crm-validator, per ADR-018 principle 4. Every entry is validated by graph/registry.py at load time: all fields required, p177_target == NOT derived, emit_shortcut permitted only when p177_target is true and must be false when p177_target is false, and every subject_class/value_class must exist in the CIDOC class catalogue.

predicates.label: same entity as
predicates.definition: Asserts that two per-source entity nodes refer to the same real-world entity (person, site, ...). Used for both cross-source identity hypotheses and intra-source phase aliasing. Subject and value are the narrowest common ancestor E1 because same_entity_as can link Ruler-Ruler, Site-Site, etc.
predicates.notes: Declared rdfs:subPropertyOf crmdig:L54_is_same_as in the manifest, so this is a parent-narrowed extension, NOT free-standing. owl:SymmetricProperty in the manifest; symmetry enforced at the application layer when only RDFS reasoning is available.

predicates.label: in dynastic period
predicates.definition: Assigns a Ruler (E21 Person) to a Dynasty (E4 Period) as a chronological bucket -- NOT family membership and NOT a ruling-house claim.
predicates.notes: Free-standing (no clean core-CRM superproperty). Tightening to a subPropertyOf is a deferred Egyptological + CRM-modelling cross-cut.

predicates.label: tomb owner
predicates.definition: The Ruler (E21 Person) a tomb (E27 Site) was commissioned for. Stable across cache reburials. NOT a derivation source for hapi:shares_tomb_with (commissioning is not interment).
predicates.notes: Free-standing Hapi-domain Ruler->Site predicate. P53_has_former_or_current_location does not fit (range E53 Place, but E27 Site is not IS-A E53).

predicates.label: original burial in
predicates.definition: The Ruler (E21 Person) whose body was first interred in this Site (E27). One of the two burial predicates that hapi:shares_tomb_with is derived from.

predicates.label: cache context at
predicates.definition: A secondary (cache) burial location (E27 Site) for a Ruler (E21 Person) -- e.g. the Dynasty 21 priestly reburials at KV35 and TT320/DB320. The second of the two burial predicates hapi:shares_tomb_with is derived from.

predicates.label: display name
predicates.definition: The canonical Anglicised display form for a Ruler (ADR-016). Value is an E41 Appellation. First predicate with a committed per-predicate resolution policy (see resolution.py).
predicates.notes: Resolution rule: prefer the Statement whose P14 is the curatorial Group AND whose P70i document kind is curator_decision_batch, most recent decided_at; else fail loud.

predicates.label: reign period
predicates.definition: A Ruler's reign as an E52 Time-Span value entity carrying boundary literals.
predicates.notes: Free-standing. A more CIDOC-idiomatic shape would reify the reign as E7/E4 carrying P4_has_time-span; deferred.

predicates.label: Horus name
predicates.definition: A Ruler's Horus titulary element. Value is an E41 Appellation carrying the literal via P190 and typed via P2_has_type.
predicates.notes: Free-standing. Rulers can have multiple Horus-name variants, hence multi.

predicates.label: matcher review verdict
predicates.definition: The P177-target predicate type for a stage-2 reviewer's verdict on a stage-1 matcher's E13. The verdict-E13's P140 subject is itself an E13; its P141 value is one of the closed verdict-outcome E55 Types.
predicates.notes: emit_shortcut MUST be false: the P141 verdict-outcome E55 vocabulary is not a useful query target, AND emitting verdict shortcuts would recurse the matcher-derived-claims gating rule. crm_nearest L43_annotates is documentation-only (L43's domain D29 does not accept E13 subjects, so no subPropertyOf). value_cardinality multi because a matcher-claim accrues a supersession chain of verdict-E13s.

predicates.label: shares tomb with
predicates.definition: DERIVED / query-only. Two Rulers (E21) are both interred in the same Site. Materialised at query time by intersecting two rulers' actual-burial site sets (original_burial_in + cache_context_at ONLY; never tomb_owner). The loader REJECTS direct E13 reifications of this predicate.
predicates.notes: The only derived predicate. p177_target=false => no :E55 Type materialised, no crm:E55_Type punning, loader rejects any E13 whose P177 targets it. owl:SymmetricProperty in the manifest. Provenance lives on the underlying original_burial_in / cache_context_at E13s, not on the derived edge.
